headline: Argus Research Maintains Buy on Hasbro, Raises Price Target to $105
summary: Argus Research  analyst Christine Dooley   maintains Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Buy and raises the price target from $90 to $105.

raw.headline: Argus Research Maintains Buy on Hasbro, Raises Price Target to $105
raw.summary: Argus Research  analyst Christine Dooley   maintains Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Buy and raises the price target from $90 to $105.

headline: Hasbro’s growth strategy isn’t just about kids anymore—it’s about ‘kidults’
summary: CEO Chris Cocks is betting the toymaker's future on grown-up collectors, card games, and nostalgia—and Wall Street likes what it's seeing.

raw.headline: Hasbro’s growth strategy isn’t just about kids anymore—it’s about ‘kidults’
